reason: SSE replay via /sync/* not implemented in Phase A
/experimental/* endpoints best-effort; not gated until Phase D
OAuth provider auth flow deferred; /provider/:id/oauth/authorize not implemented
GET /provider returns the models.dev catalog (plan 04); not implemented in plan-01 M1/M2

GET /find/file approximates opencode two ways, so it is not gated by a parity scenario: (1) ignore semantics — opencode delegates to `rg --files` (full .gitignore); Forge uses a fixed ignore set (.git/node_modules/vendor/.forge + hidden), so results may include files .gitignore would exclude. (2) ranking — opencode uses fuzzysort; Forge uses its own subsequence scorer, so result ORDER differs (membership is comparable, order is not). The missing-query 400 body is Forge's {_tag,message} rather than opencode's Effect Query error.
